User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Aulas Online Senra platform.

photoUrl.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

isTeacher.description: Indicates whether the user is a teacher.

Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: Represents a subject that can be taught on the platform.

TeacherProfile.title: TeacherProfile
TeacherProfile.description: Represents the profile of a teacher, including their availability and subject expertise.

id.description: Unique identifier for the teacher profile.

description.description: Description of the teacher's background and expertise.

availability.description: Teacher's availability schedule (e.g., JSON representation of available times).

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: Represents a scheduled lesson between a student and a teacher.

startTime.description: Date and time the lesson starts.

endTime.description: Date and time the lesson ends.

status.description: Status of the lesson (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled).

PaymentPackage.title: PaymentPackage
PaymentPackage.description: Represents a package of lessons a student can purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment package.

name.description: Name of the payment package (e.g., 4 lessons, 8 lessons).

numberOfLessons.description: Number of lessons included in the package.

StudentPurchase.title: StudentPurchase
StudentPurchase.description: Represents a student's purchase of a payment package.

id.description: Unique identifier for the student purchase.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used (e.g., PayPal, Mercado Pago).

lessonsRemaining.description: The amount of lessons remaining on the purchased package.

SessionFeedback.title: SessionFeedback
SessionFeedback.description: Represents feedback given by a student after a lesson session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the session feedback.

rating.description: Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comments.description: Additional comments provided by the student.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. This path ensures that user data is isolated and only accessible to the authenticated user with the matching userId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores teacher profile information associated with a specific user. This path allows teachers to manage their profiles and availability. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (teacher).

params.name: teacherProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the teacher profile.

definition.description: Stores subject information. This collection is globally accessible for reading to allow users to select subjects. No write access for standard users.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

definition.description: Stores lesson information associated with a specific user (either student or teacher). Includes denormalized 'studentId' and 'teacherId' for authorization independence.  This allows easy filtering of lessons for a specific student or teacher.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student or teacher).

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier for the lesson.

definition.description: Stores payment package information. This collection is globally accessible for reading to allow users to purchase packages. No write access for standard users.

params.name: paymentPackageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment package.

definition.description: Stores student purchase information associated with a specific user. This path ensures that only the student who made the purchase can access the purchase data.  Includes denormalized 'studentId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student).

params.name: studentPurchaseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the student purchase.

definition.description: Stores session feedback provided by a student for a specific lesson. This path ensures that only the student who participated in the lesson can provide feedback. Includes denormalized 'studentId', 'teacherId', and 'lessonId' from the lesson document for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student).

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier for the lesson.

params.name: sessionFeedbackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the session feedback.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and data isolation for each user, aligning with the application's requirement to display only the logged-in user's information. By nesting all user-specific data under the `/users/{userId}` path, we ensure that data access is inherently restricted to the user with the matching `userId`. This eliminates the need for complex `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and easier debugging.

The structure supports the required QAPs by:

1.  **Private Data**: Using path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/...`) ensures that each user's data is private by default and accessible only to them (and administrators).
2.  **Segregation**: Each collection is structured to store data with a homogeneous security posture. For instance, user profiles and lessons are neatly organized within the user's document, enforcing clear boundaries. Teacher profiles are distinct, facilitating separate management.
3.  **Admin Overrides:** The structure does not include any mechanism for admin overrides. If admin access is required, the structure must be modified to use global collections.
